speaker: RIVERS
text: Sir Richard Ratcliffe, let me tell thee this:

speaker: RIVERS
text: Today shalt thou behold a subject die

speaker: RIVERS
text: For truth, for duty, and for loyalty.

speaker: GREY
text: God bless the Prince from all the pack of you!

speaker: GREY
text: A knot you are of damnèd bloodsuckers.

speaker: VAUGHAN
text: You live that shall cry woe for this hereafter.

speaker: RATCLIFFE
text: Dispatch. The limit of your lives is out.

speaker: RIVERS
text: O Pomfret, Pomfret! O thou bloody prison,

speaker: RIVERS
text: Fatal and ominous to noble peers!

speaker: RIVERS
text: Within the guilty closure of thy walls,

speaker: RIVERS
text: Richard the Second here was hacked to death,

speaker: RIVERS
text: And, for more slander to thy dismal seat,

speaker: RIVERS
text: We give to thee our guiltless blood to drink.

speaker: GREY
text: Now Margaret’s curse is fall’n upon our heads,

speaker: GREY
text: When she exclaimed on Hastings, you, and I,

speaker: GREY
text: For standing by when Richard stabbed her son.

speaker: RIVERS
text: Then cursed she Richard. Then cursed she Buckingham.

speaker: RIVERS
text: Then cursed she Hastings. O, remember, God,

speaker: RIVERS
text: To hear her prayer for them as now for us!

speaker: RIVERS
text: And for my sister and her princely sons,

speaker: RIVERS
text: Be satisfied, dear God, with our true blood,

speaker: RIVERS
text: Which, as thou know’st, unjustly must be spilt.

speaker: RATCLIFFE
text: Make haste. The hour of death is expiate.

speaker: RIVERS
text: Come, Grey. Come, Vaughan. Let us here embrace.

speaker: RIVERS
text: Farewell until we meet again in heaven.
